title:
Registration of Five Spanish Peanut Germplasm
Lines with Fresh Seed Dormancy
abstract:
ICGV 86155, ICGV 86156, ICGV 86158, ICGV 87378, and
ICGV 87921 Spanish peanut (ArachishypogaeaL. subsp.fastigiata
Waldron var. vulgaris Harz) improved germplasm lines (Reg. no.
GP-79 to GP-83, P1 594969 to P1 594973) were bred at the Asia
Center of the International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-
Arid Tropics (ICRISAT), Patancheru, Andhra Pradesh, India.
These five lines were released in 1995 by the Plant Materials
Identification Committee of ICRISAT for their fresh seed dormancy
in the Spanish background.
